purpose: Record the project state before the next major source download.

current_git_state.meaning: The July 2 refresh produced many changed and untracked files while an older interactive rebase was still paused. A major download should not be started until the rebase is completed or otherwise resolved, then this state is either committed, reviewed, or intentionally accepted by the project owner.

pre_download_gate.owner_decision_needed: Before running another large download, decide whether to complete the paused rebase and then commit the current refresh state, or proceed knowing the working tree is already dirty.
